title: Gaseous Horror damages attacker when hit

card.rawText: When this creature is hit, the attacking creature receives 5 damage. If this card is killed in battle, inflict 10 damage to the creature that killed it.

effect.value: When this creature is hit, the attacking creature receives 5 damage. If this card is killed in battle, inflict 10 damage to the creature that killed it.

plan.title: Gaseous Horror damages attacker when hit
plan.summary: Attack Gaseous Horror and verify the attacking creature receives 5 damage when the hit lands.

notes: Read text first: When this creature is hit, the attacking creature receives 5 damage. If this card is killed in battle, inflict 10 damage to the creature that killed it.

riskNotes: Fixture is scoped to the deterministic headless route; red results should identify missing runtime support or assertion drift.
